plugin.name: Focus Buddy
plugin.description: A pet Pomodoro-style focus timer that helps you focus, then nudges you to take breaks.
config.focusLength.label: Focus length
config.focusLength.description: Choose how long each focus session lasts.
config.breakStyle.label: Break style
config.breakStyle.description: Gentle keeps alerts calm and silent; normal can play your sound.
config.sound.label: Alert sound
command.startFocus.title: Start focus session
command.pauseResume.title: Pause or resume
command.pauseResume.description: Pause or continue the current timer.
command.endSession.title: End session
command.endSession.description: Stop the current focus or break timer.
command.skipToBreak.title: Skip to break
command.skipToBreak.description: End focus now and start a break.
command.showStatus.title: Show status
command.showStatus.description: Show what Focus Buddy is doing.
alert.focusComplete.title: Break time?
alert.focusComplete.text: Nice focus session. Want to take a break now?
alert.breakComplete.title: Ready to focus again?
alert.breakComplete.text: Break is done. Ready for another focus session?
speech.breakOver: Welcome back. Ready when you are.
